subject: (no subject)
body:
Hey, Naomi called me and left a VM in tears - sd she just spoke to you and to call her..I haven't spoken to her in a v v long time. Should I call her back? Is all ok?

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note
